title: Author hilbert-space-schemas family v0.1.0 in schema-universal — type each Hilbert space as first-class record (real-world, MCU, Trigun, GitS, Borderlands, Greek myth, YC org, Google org, etc.)
description:
Per substrate-multi-timeline-rendering-and-comparison Concept (mono 5eacbdec52) + N-parallel-Hilbert-spaces realization. Substrate currently uses Hilbert-space refs as free-form strings (character.sH and worldline.hS fields are `type: string`). Promote to LinkRef-typed via a hilbert-space-schemas family.

Family contents:
- HilbertSpaceModel — slug, name, kind (real | fictional | organizational | doctrinal), canonicalRules (free-form prose for now), foundingYear (if known), substrateBindings (LinkRef[] to substrate Concepts), notesAndProvenance.
- HilbertSpaceKindOrdinalityTable — closed-condensable catalog: real-world | fictional-narrative | fictional-game | mythological | organizational | doctrinal.

First-instance records to materialize after family lands:
- vaults/hilbert-spaces/real-world.json
- vaults/hilbert-spaces/marvel-cinematic-universe.json (Tony Stark, JARVIS, Iron Man suit)
- vaults/hilbert-spaces/trigun.json (Vash, Plant biology)
- vaults/hilbert-spaces/ghost-in-the-shell.json (logikoma, Section 9)
- vaults/hilbert-spaces/borderlands.json (claptrap)
- vaults/hilbert-spaces/greek-myth.json (Castor/Pollux, Olympian hierarchy)
- vaults/hilbert-spaces/a-beautiful-mind.json (Nash, Hansen)
- vaults/hilbert-spaces/y-combinator-org.json (Andover/Bucknell-formed founders, batches)
- vaults/hilbert-spaces/a16z-org.json (Speedrun, fund vintages, GP roles)
- vaults/hilbert-spaces/google-org.json (L3-L9, Piper, TAP — the substrate-quantizes-googles-organizational-hilbert-space Concept's source)
- vaults/hilbert-spaces/substrate-doctrine.json (substrate's own Hilbert space, with its canonical-rules being the wrkstrm-doctrine vault contents)

Closure: family lands; 8+ instance records lands; character.sH + worldline.hS fields migrate from string to LinkRef references; LDT proof asserts all existing characters' sH fields resolve to known HilbertSpaceModel records (three-valued-logic UNKNOWN → TRUE).

Priority-1 alongside a16z-speedrun-pitch-fanout — the Hilbert-space-typed substrate is what the a16z pitch leverages (substrate is a typed multiverse-IMDB; this family makes the multiverse part real).
